query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ai_engines` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `provider` enum('OPENAI','GEMINI','ANTHROPIC','CUSTOM_HTTP') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPENAI',
  `enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `is_primary` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `model` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `base_url` varchar(512),
  `timeout_ms` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30000,
  `max_retries` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 2,
  `temperature` decimal(3,2),
  `max_output_tokens` int,
  `extra_json` json,
  `secret_ciphertext` text,
  `created_by` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_org_name` (`org_id`, `name`),
  KEY `idx_org_enabled` (`org_id`, `enabled`),
  KEY `idx_org_updated` (`org_id`, `updated_at` DESC)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ai_routing_rules` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `priority` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `use_case` enum('DRIVE_DIAG','ANALYTICS','SUMMARIZE','INGEST_LONG','GENERAL') NOT NULL,
  `conditions_json` json,
  `target_engine_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `idx_org_usecase_priority` (`org_id`, `use_case`, `priority`)
);
